description: In 2013, Dove released its 'Real Beauty Sketches' campaign, which went viral globally. The campaign was praised for its emotional resonance and body-positivity message, though it faced criticism regarding the company's dual role in owning beauty brands that promote unrealistic standards.

key_events.description: Video reaches 10 million views in 10 days; global media praise begins.
Academic and industry critics publish articles on 'brand hypocrisy' regarding Unilever's portfolio.
The campaign is parodied by comedy groups, shifting public focus from message to production.
Campaign recognized as one of the most successful viral marketing events in history by industry trade journals.

calibration_notes: Ideal for measuring the 'halo effect' of purpose-driven marketing and the durability of brand sentiment against logical inconsistencies.
